name: Accordion
description: Expandable/collapsible content sections. Supports single (one open) or multiple (many open) modes. Chevron icon rotates on expand/collapse.

single.description: Only one item open at a time. Value is string.

multiple.description: Many items can be open. Value is string[].

value.description: Controlled open value(s). Single uses string; multiple uses string[].

onValueChange.description: (value: string | string[]) => void. Called when open state changes.

AccordionItem.description: Wrapper for a single accordion section. Provides value, disabled, and showDivider context.

value.description: Unique value for this item (used for open state and accessibility).

disabled.description: When true, trigger and content use disabled styling and are not expandable.

showDivider.description: When true, a Divider is shown between trigger and content when expanded.

AccordionTrigger.description: Button that toggles expand/collapse. Optional iconLeft. Chevron rotates: expand_more (collapsed) → expand_less (expanded).

iconLeft.description: Optional icon or element shown to the left of the heading (e.g. info icon).

disabled.description: Overrides item-level disabled. When undefined, inherits from AccordionItem.

AccordionContent.description: Collapsible content panel. Renders only when item is expanded. When AccordionItem.showDivider is true, Divider renders above content.

accessibility.notes: AccordionItem provides triggerId and contentId for aria-controls/aria-labelledby. AccordionTrigger uses aria-expanded and aria-controls.
